attributes.title: [Redis Enterprise OTel] Shard Diagnostics
attributes.description: Shard-level deep diagnostics for Redis Enterprise: per-shard resource usage, memory fragmentation, persistence operations, replication health, error analysis, and client connection patterns.

params.markdown:
## [Redis Enterprise OTel] Shard Diagnostics

Granular shard-level monitoring for deep troubleshooting:
- Per-shard memory, CPU, and ops/sec for hot-spot detection
- Memory fragmentation and allocator behaviour
- AOF rewrite and RDB snapshot activity with CoW overhead
- Replication lag and sync status
- Error replies and ACL denial breakdown
- Client connection saturation and blocked clients
- Event loop performance metrics

query.esql:
FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE redis_up IS NOT NULL
| STATS shard_status = MAX(redis_up) BY redis
| STATS shards_up = SUM(shard_status), total_shards = COUNT(*)

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE redis_up IS NOT NULL
| STATS shard_status = MAX(redis_up) BY redis
| STATS shards_up = SUM(shard_status), total_shards = COUNT(*)

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE redis_used_memory IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_mem = AVG(redis_used_memory)

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE redis_used_memory IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_mem = AVG(redis_used_memory)

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE redis_instantaneous_ops_per_sec IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_ops = AVG(redis_instantaneous_ops_per_sec)

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE redis_instantaneous_ops_per_sec IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_ops = AVG(redis_instantaneous_ops_per_sec)

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE redis_blocked_clients IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_blocked = AVG(redis_blocked_clients) BY redis
| STATS total_blocked = SUM(avg_blocked)

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE redis_blocked_clients IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_blocked = AVG(redis_blocked_clients) BY redis
| STATS total_blocked = SUM(avg_blocked)

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE redis_total_error_replies IS NOT NULL
| STATS total_errors = SUM(redis_total_error_replies)

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE redis_total_error_replies IS NOT NULL
| STATS total_errors = SUM(redis_total_error_replies)

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE redis_mem_fragmentation_ratio IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_frag = AVG(redis_mem_fragmentation_ratio)

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE redis_mem_fragmentation_ratio IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_frag = AVG(redis_mem_fragmentation_ratio)

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE redis_connected_clients IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_clients = AVG(redis_connected_clients) BY redis
| STATS total_clients = SUM(avg_clients)

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE redis_connected_clients IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_clients = AVG(redis_connected_clients) BY redis
| STATS total_clients = SUM(avg_clients)

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE redis_active_defrag_running IS NOT NULL
| STATS defrag_active = SUM(redis_active_defrag_running)

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE redis_active_defrag_running IS NOT NULL
| STATS defrag_active = SUM(redis_active_defrag_running)

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE redis_used_memory IS NOT NULL
| STATS used_memory = AVG(redis_used_memory) BY redis, bdb, role
| EVAL label = CONCAT(redis, " (", role, ")")
| SORT used_memory DESC
| LIMIT 20

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE redis_used_memory IS NOT NULL
| STATS used_memory = AVG(redis_used_memory) BY redis, bdb, role
| EVAL label = CONCAT(redis, " (", role, ")")
| SORT used_memory DESC
| LIMIT 20

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE redis_instantaneous_ops_per_sec IS NOT NULL
| STATS ops = AVG(redis_instantaneous_ops_per_sec) BY redis, bdb, role
| EVAL label = CONCAT(redis, " (", role, ")")
| SORT ops DESC
| LIMIT 20

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE redis_instantaneous_ops_per_sec IS NOT NULL
| STATS ops = AVG(redis_instantaneous_ops_per_sec) BY redis, bdb, role
| EVAL label = CONCAT(redis, " (", role, ")")
| SORT ops DESC
| LIMIT 20

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE redis_process_cpu_usage_percent IS NOT NULL
| STATS cpu_pct = AVG(redis_process_cpu_usage_percent) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), redis
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE redis_process_cpu_usage_percent IS NOT NULL
| STATS cpu_pct = AVG(redis_process_cpu_usage_percent) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), redis
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE redis_mem_fragmentation_ratio IS NOT NULL
| STATS frag = AVG(redis_mem_fragmentation_ratio) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), redis
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE redis_mem_fragmentation_ratio IS NOT NULL
| STATS frag = AVG(redis_mem_fragmentation_ratio) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), redis
| SORT time_bucket ASC

attributes.title: AOF Rewrite & RDB Save Activity Over Time

query.esql:
FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE redis_aof_rewrite_in_progress IS NOT NULL
| STATS aof_rewrites = SUM(redis_aof_rewrite_in_progress), rdb_saves = SUM(redis_rdb_bgsave_in_progress) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE redis_aof_rewrite_in_progress IS NOT NULL
| STATS aof_rewrites = SUM(redis_aof_rewrite_in_progress), rdb_saves = SUM(redis_rdb_bgsave_in_progress) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE redis_current_cow_size IS NOT NULL
| STATS cow_size = MAX(redis_current_cow_size) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), redis
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE redis_current_cow_size IS NOT NULL
| STATS cow_size = MAX(redis_current_cow_size) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), redis
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE redis_current_fork_perc IS NOT NULL
| STATS fork_pct = MAX(redis_current_fork_perc) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), redis
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE redis_current_fork_perc IS NOT NULL
| STATS fork_pct = MAX(redis_current_fork_perc) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), redis
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE redis_rdb_changes_since_last_save IS NOT NULL
| STATS changes = AVG(redis_rdb_changes_since_last_save) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), redis
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE redis_rdb_changes_since_last_save IS NOT NULL
| STATS changes = AVG(redis_rdb_changes_since_last_save) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), redis
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE redis_total_error_replies IS NOT NULL
| STATS errors = SUM(redis_total_error_replies) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), redis
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE redis_total_error_replies IS NOT NULL
| STATS errors = SUM(redis_total_error_replies) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), redis
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE redis_connected_clients IS NOT NULL
| STATS clients = AVG(redis_connected_clients) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), redis
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE redis_connected_clients IS NOT NULL
| STATS clients = AVG(redis_connected_clients) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), redis
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE redis_blocked_clients IS NOT NULL
| STATS blocked = AVG(redis_blocked_clients) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), redis
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE redis_blocked_clients IS NOT NULL
| STATS blocked = AVG(redis_blocked_clients) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), redis
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE redis_eventloop_duration_sum IS NOT NULL
| STATS loop_duration = AVG(redis_eventloop_duration_sum) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), redis
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE redis_eventloop_duration_sum IS NOT NULL
| STATS loop_duration = AVG(redis_eventloop_duration_sum) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), redis
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE redis_up IS NOT NULL
| STATS Status = MAX(redis_up), `Used Memory` = AVG(redis_used_memory), `Max Memory` = AVG(redis_maxmemory), `RSS` = AVG(redis_used_memory_rss), `Frag Ratio` = AVG(redis_mem_fragmentation_ratio), `Ops/sec` = AVG(redis_instantaneous_ops_per_sec), `CPU %` = AVG(redis_process_cpu_usage_percent), `Clients` = AVG(redis_connected_clients), `Blocked` = AVG(redis_blocked_clients), `Errors` = SUM(redis_total_error_replies) BY redis, bdb, node, role
| EVAL `Memory %` = COALESCE(ROUND((`Used Memory` / `Max Memory`) * 100, 1), 0.0)
| EVAL Status = COALESCE(Status, 0), `Used Memory` = COALESCE(`Used Memory`, 0), `Max Memory` = COALESCE(`Max Memory`, 0), `RSS` = COALESCE(`RSS`, 0), `Frag Ratio` = COALESCE(`Frag Ratio`, 0.0), `Ops/sec` = COALESCE(`Ops/sec`, 0.0), `CPU %` = COALESCE(`CPU %`, 0.0), `Clients` = COALESCE(`Clients`, 0), `Blocked` = COALESCE(`Blocked`, 0), `Errors` = COALESCE(`Errors`, 0)
| SORT `Used Memory` DESC
| LIMIT 100

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE redis_up IS NOT NULL
| STATS Status = MAX(redis_up), `Used Memory` = AVG(redis_used_memory), `Max Memory` = AVG(redis_maxmemory), `RSS` = AVG(redis_used_memory_rss), `Frag Ratio` = AVG(redis_mem_fragmentation_ratio), `Ops/sec` = AVG(redis_instantaneous_ops_per_sec), `CPU %` = AVG(redis_process_cpu_usage_percent), `Clients` = AVG(redis_connected_clients), `Blocked` = AVG(redis_blocked_clients), `Errors` = SUM(redis_total_error_replies) BY redis, bdb, node, role
| EVAL `Memory %` = COALESCE(ROUND((`Used Memory` / `Max Memory`) * 100, 1), 0.0)
| EVAL Status = COALESCE(Status, 0), `Used Memory` = COALESCE(`Used Memory`, 0), `Max Memory` = COALESCE(`Max Memory`, 0), `RSS` = COALESCE(`RSS`, 0), `Frag Ratio` = COALESCE(`Frag Ratio`, 0.0), `Ops/sec` = COALESCE(`Ops/sec`, 0.0), `CPU %` = COALESCE(`CPU %`, 0.0), `Clients` = COALESCE(`Clients`, 0), `Blocked` = COALESCE(`Blocked`, 0), `Errors` = COALESCE(`Errors`, 0)
| SORT `Used Memory` DESC
| LIMIT 100
